selection_likelihood:
High - candidate is an exceptional match with deep dbt domain ownership,
  Snowflake, Apache Airflow DAG orchestration, Looker semantic layer, CI/CD, data governance with lineage,  
  fintech domain depth across regulated environments (REMIT/EMIR at Castleton, fintech transactions at      
  Sodexo), mentoring, and ML workflow enablement — covering every core and desirable requirement.

skills.Cloud Platforms:
AWS (S3, EC2, EMR, Glue, Redshift), Snowflake, Azure (Data Factory, Databricks,   
  Synapse), GCP, Terraform
skills.Data Engineering Tools:
DBT (Core/Cloud), Apache Airflow (DAGs, Dag Factory), Looker, Looker API,  
  Fivetran, PySpark, Kafka, Data Vault 2.0, CDC, ELT, MLOps, Model Registry, Experiment Tracking, Model     
  Versioning
skills.CI/CD:
Git, CI/CD pipelines, Automated Testing, Code Linting, Code Reviews, RBAC, Azure DevOps,    
  Agile/Scrum, L3 Support
skills.Data techniques:
ETL, ELT, Analytics-Ready Data Marts, Data Modelling, Semantic Governance, Data   
  Lineage, Data Governance, RBAC, Snowflake Cost Optimisation, Technical Debt Refactoring, Physical
  Modelling, Data Warehousing, CDC, Reconciliation, Semantic Layers, Observability, Self-Service Analytics, 
  Near-Real-Time Inference, Feature Drift Monitoring, Model Rollback

Build A Rocket Boy:
Owned **dbt** modelling architecture across multiple domains, designing and evolving scalable      
  **analytics-ready data marts** integrating 100+ source systems into a centralised **Snowflake** warehouse 
  processing 120+ TB.

Led **dbt** platform migration owning **Snowflake** schema design, **ELT** pipelines, and **CI/CD**
   with **automated testing**, code linting, and **code review** standards elevating analytics engineering  
  quality.

Designed **Apache Airflow** DAG orchestration and alerting frameworks for **ELT** workflows using  
  **Fivetran** and **Python**, with **observability** controls ensuring pipeline SLA adherence and incident 
  response.

Strengthened **semantic governance** across **dbt** and **Looker** using the **Looker API**,       
  enabling trusted **ML** workflow enablement and self-service analytics for 150+ stakeholders over
  **Snowflake** data marts.
Owned **dbt** domain modelling architecture in **Snowflake**, designing scalable **ELT** pipelines 
  and **analytics-ready data marts** with **Apache Airflow** orchestration supporting 250+ TB of regulated  
  fintech trading data.

Developed complex **SQL** transformation logic for pre-trade and market data, translating business 
  and risk requirements into governed, analytics-ready datasets supporting P&L, mark-to-market, and VaR     
  reporting.

Implemented **data governance** and **RBAC** security controls with **data lineage** tracking and  
  audit-ready documentation, ensuring trusted, compliant analytics for 30+ front-office and risk
  stakeholders.

Led structured **code reviews**, authored technical documentation, and mentored junior engineers on
   **dbt** modelling standards, naming conventions, and **CI/CD** best practices, driving engineering       
  culture improvements.

Integrated REMIT/EMIR regulatory datasets into governed **dbt** models with **data lineage**,      
  auditability, and **semantic governance** controls using **Terraform**-managed infrastructure ensuring    
  audit-ready compliance.
Sodexo:
Led **CDC**-based fintech **ELT** pipeline delivery using Azure ADF, **Fivetran**, and **PySpark**,
   building **observability** and SLA adherence frameworks that reduced third-party tooling costs by 80%.

Reported to CTO, owning fintech **analytics-ready data mart** architecture and delivering a        
  self-service platform trusted across Product, Risk, and Finance for 1M+ daily business decisions.

Designed orchestration pipelines with **CI/CD**, **automated testing**, code **linting**, and      
  **data governance** controls, delivering reliable **ELT** workflows with structured incident response     
  practices.

Mentored junior engineers and led **Data Vault 2.0** data modelling refactoring with rules engines,
   enforcing naming conventions and governance standards, reducing technical debt and data redundancy by    
  45%.
Wherescape USA:
Delivered multi-client **Snowflake** data warehouse migrations with performance tuning, **cost     
  optimisation**, workload isolation, and **automated testing** ensuring SLA compliance for FTSE-scale      
  enterprise clients.

Designed **Snowflake** external tables on **AWS** S3 for semi-structured data using physical       
  modelling best practices and **SQL** query optimisation, producing scalable **ELT** datasets for
  downstream consumers.

Authored **SQL** transformations and built incremental **ELT** pipelines for AMD Malaysia
  migration, loading 1B records with 80% efficiency gain using **Git**-based version control and
  **Agile/Scrum** delivery.
